message:
migrate while.zig to builder pattern with captureExpr

- Replace CodeBuilder with getBuilder() (standard pattern)
- Use b.write for condition setup, captureExpr for genExpr integration
- Flush before body generation, use self.emit for body
- Pattern: builder → flush → body (same as with.zig)

Test: bool 140/143, unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 - no regressions
